prompt:
A planning sheet clipped to a field board, showing a rough long-exposure star trail composition with horizon framing marks, tripod orientation arrows, and circular trail layout guides. A tripod head, interval remote, and red flashlight nearby make it obvious this is a composition plan for astrophotography rather than a generic sketch.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a calm near-future astronomy aesthetic: dim but soft field lighting, realistic paper texture, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the composition centered and icon-friendly so the planning sheet reads clearly as a DSPACE astrophotography artifact.
